case_title: FAST CASH INC. VS HEPTONSTALL, JOHN DBA TIDEWATER CONSULTING INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PLFT'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO $2500. CONSOLIDATED W/ CASE #S 780284, 780286 & 780305. PARTIES HAVE SET- TLED. DEFT HEPTONSTALL TO PAY PLFT $2000 BY 10/1/9

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY FAST CASH INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HEPTONSTALL, JOHN DBA TIDEWATER CONSULTING INC. WAYNE, BILL DBA TIDEWATEER CONSULTING INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 10/15/99, THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAST CASH INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEPTONSTALL, JOHN DBA TIDEWATER CONSULTING INC. WAYNE, BILL DBA TIDEWATEER CONSULTING INC. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,580.00, CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE NOS. 780284; 780286 AND 780305. JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HEPTONSTALL, JOHN DBA TIDEWATER CONSULTING INC.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WAYNE, BILL DBA TIDEWATEER CONSULTING INC.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-20-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-15-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
